description: New user creates a profile, completes intake, selects CBT, enters therapy, and exits cleanly.
scripted_responses: I've been feeling anxious about work, and it has started affecting my sleep.
It is mostly pressure from deadlines and worrying that my manager thinks I am falling behind.
I notice my chest gets tight at night and I replay conversations from the day.
My partner says I seem distracted, and I have stopped exercising because I feel exhausted.
I grew up trying to be the reliable one, so mistakes at work feel much bigger than they are.
I would like practical help challenging the thought that one mistake means I'm failing.
CBT sounds like the best fit for me.
I want to focus on the anxious thoughts that show up before sleep.
fallback_response: I'm feeling anxious about work and would like to understand it better.

forbid_assistant_phrases: still here and we’re on track
still here and we're on track
not a licensed therapist or clinician
can't provide a formal therapy plan
can’t provide a formal therapy plan
